creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alan Somers from comment #3)
kyua console output is available at:
https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-amd64-test/14387/testReport/sys.fs.fusefs/lookup/main/

For -v in googletest, I am not sure but we can execute them in the same VM CI use. Please see https://wiki.freebsd.org/Jenkins/Debug
